title: Administrator can sign in and reach the admin dashboard
description: Verifies an administrator can log in from the login page and is redirected into the protected admin dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the admin dashboard

title: Create and publish a property with CEP address lookup and images
description: Verifies an operator can create a new property with CEP-filled address, upload images, publish it, and see it listed in inventory.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the properties module
Start new property creation
Fill Property A into the property title field
Fill a valid price into the price field
Select a valid category in the category field
Fill a valid CEP into the CEP field and trigger the lookup
Upload multiple valid image files into the property images input
Toggle the published status to enabled
Save the property
Verify the new property is listed in the inventory with published status indicated

title: Update a lead status and see it reflected in the list
description: Ensures an operator can open a lead, change its status, and see the updated status reflected when returning to the leads list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open lead management
Open the details view for a lead from the list
Update the lead status to a different valid status
Verify the leads list shows the lead with the updated status

title: Create a new contract with metadata and a document and see it listed
description: Ensures an operator can create a contract by entering metadata, uploading a document, saving, and then seeing the new contract in the contracts list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open contract management
Start creating a new contract
Fill required contract metadata fields with valid values
Upload a valid contract document file
Save the contract
Verify the contracts list includes the newly created contract

title: Create a new client and see it listed in the directory
description: Ensures an operator can add a client with contact and company details and then see the client listed in the directory.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open the client directory
Start creating a new client
Fill client contact and company fields with valid values
Save the client
Verify the client directory list includes the newly created client

title: Filter leads by status to triage the pipeline
description: Ensures an operator can filter the leads list by status and only matching leads are shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open lead management
Select a valid lead status filter
Verify only leads matching the selected status are displayed

title: View and update a user's role or permissions
description: Verifies an administrator can edit an existing user’s role or permissions and the updated role is reflected in the user list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to user management
Start editing a user from the user list
Change the user role to a different available role
Save the user changes
Verify the user list reflects the updated role or permissions for the edited user

title: Apply multiple lead filters and see filtered results
description: Ensures an operator can apply multiple filters on the leads list and see the results update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open lead management
Apply a first valid filter on the leads list
Apply a second valid filter on the leads list
Verify the leads list updates to reflect the combined filters

title: Search or filter the client directory to find matching clients
description: Ensures an operator can search or filter clients and the directory shows only matching results.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open the client directory
Enter a search term or select a valid filter value
Verify the client list updates to show only clients matching the search or filter

title: Save application settings successfully
description: Verifies an administrator can change an application setting and save, receiving a visible confirmation that updates were applied.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to application settings
Change a setting value to another valid value
Save the settings changes
Verify a success confirmation is visible indicating settings were updated

title: Prevent saving a contract when an unsupported file type is uploaded
description: Ensures the contract form shows a file type validation error and prevents completion when an unsupported document type is selected.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open contract management
Start creating a new contract
Attempt to upload a document with an unsupported file type
Verify a file type validation error is visible and the contract cannot be saved

title: Validation blocks saving invalid application setting value
description: Verifies that entering an invalid value for a setting shows a validation error and prevents saving.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to application settings
Fill an invalid value into a setting field that enforces validation
Attempt to save the settings
Verify a validation error is visible for the invalid setting input

title: Required-field validation blocks saving a new property
description: Verifies the property form shows validation errors and prevents saving when required fields are left empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the properties module
Start new property creation
Attempt to save the property without filling required fields
Verify required-field validation errors are visible

title: Required-field validation when creating a new user
description: Verifies that attempting to create a new user with required fields left empty shows validation errors and does not create the user.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to user management
Start new user creation
Attempt to save the new user without filling required fields
Verify required-field validation errors are displayed

title: Login form validates invalid email format
description: Verifies the login form blocks submission with an invalid email format and shows an email validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill invalid-email into the email field
Fill any-password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Cancel editing a user without persisting changes
description: Verifies that canceling out of editing a user does not persist changes to role or permissions in the user list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to user management
Start editing a user from the user list
Change the user role to a different available role
Cancel and return to the user list without saving
Verify the user list does not reflect the unsaved role or permission change

title: Cancel settings changes without persisting
description: Verifies that abandoning settings edits without saving does not persist the modified values.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to application settings
Change a setting value to another valid value
Click the control to leave the page without saving by navigating to another admin module
Click the navigation link back to application settings
Verify the previously changed setting value was not persisted
